schema.label: human-readable label
schema.source_kinds: array of evidence kinds that produced this id (segment_label, transcript_phrase, frame_engagement)
schema.n_observations: total observation count across the corpus
schema.n_videos: distinct videos in which this mechanism was observed
schema.sample_evidence: up to 3 evidence rows for inspection
schema.emergence_method: how the id was produced (always observation-derived)
